performance_overview: Through 15 sessions (inception 2026-06-01) Bull has 7 completed trades: 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — only bucket with consistent wins; enforce this range aggressively at entry (n=2, sample small but signal is clean)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — overbought chase entries have all lost; hard ceiling
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — even worse; this bucket must be skipped entirely
overnight_hold_insights: Zero genuine overnight carries across all 15 sessions. Policy unchanged: profitable + trailing-stop-active + price>EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion all required. The absence of overnight holds reflects the thin, extended candidate pool of recent sessions — no position has met all six criteria simultaneously.
